Introduction

Base URL: http://localhost

This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile). You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).

Authenticating requests

This API is not authenticated.

Endpoints

GET api/user

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/user" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/user"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

GET api/user

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Display a listing of the resource.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v1/en/brands" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/brands"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Store a newly created resource in storage.

curl --request POST \

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/brands"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/v1/en/users/{key}

Headers

Example: 1

PUT api/v1/en/users

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/users" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/users"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

);

const headers = {

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/v1/en/organizational-units

Headers

GET api/v1/en/directorates

curl --request GET \

    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/directorates"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/v1/en/directorates

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

GET api/v1/en/cost-centers

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v1/en/cost-centers" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/cost-centers"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/v1/en/business-areas

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v1/en/business-areas" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/en/business-areas"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
